calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:15am

Judge Pro Tem Joseph Jedekin, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept 525. Caused called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Gigi Fields appears Pro Per. Respondent King American Ambulance, Inc. does not appear. Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jedekin.

Judge Jedekin allows a camera crew from CBS Channel 5 in the court to video the preceedings with Ms. Fields consent.

Evidence is retained. Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-21-2011 Judgment Entered
